name: Vikram Sinha
summary: SOC Analyst with 1.5 years of experience in L1 alert monitoring and incident triage for an MSSP. CompTIA Security+ certified. Familiar with Splunk and Microsoft Sentinel. Currently preparing for CEH certification. Seeking to move into L2 threat hunting and VAPT roles.

education.institution: SRM Institute of Science and Technology, Chennai

experience.title: SOC Analyst – L1
responsibilities: Monitored 2,500+ daily alerts on Microsoft Sentinel for 8 enterprise clients across BFSI and retail sectors.
Triaged and classified security alerts; escalated 40–60 incidents per month to L2/L3 team.
Created and maintained 15 alert suppression rules to reduce false positives by 22%.
Participated in 3 tabletop IR exercises with client CISO teams.
Generated daily shift reports and monthly security summary dashboards for client stakeholders.

experience.title: IT Security Intern
responsibilities: Assisted in access control reviews and IAM audit for internal Active Directory.
Documented security SOPs for phishing email handling procedures.
Supported evidence collection for ISO 27001 certification audit.

projects.name: IOC Enrichment Script
projects.description: Wrote a Python script to auto-enrich IP/domain IoCs from Sentinel alerts using VirusTotal and AbuseIPDB APIs. Reduced manual lookups from 5 min to 30 sec per alert.

certifications.name: Microsoft Security Operations Analyst (SC-200) – In Progress

achievements: Most Improved Analyst – NetGuard Security Q4 2023
TryHackMe – Top 10% Global Rank (as of May 2024)
